location: On a corpse near the Mimic Tear Ashes inside Night's Sacred Ground, in Nokron, Eternal City. From the Night's Sacred Ground grace, go up the stairs into a room with two Night Maidens and a Sphere Silver Tear, climb the ladder at the back right, then find and jump through the single unbarred window on the shingled roof past the Fanged Imp Statue fog wall.
tactics: Clear the room of two Night Maidens and a Sphere Silver Tear before continuing — they guard the route to the ladder.
Sphere Silver Tears roll and explode on contact; dodge sideways rather than backing straight away from them.
The window is easy to miss — it's the only unbarred one on the shingled roof section past the Fanged Imp Statue fog wall.
lore: A teardrop-shaped hammer made by the night-dwelling Nox monks of the Eternal City, cast from the liquid metal of a Silver Tear and hardened through careful tempering.

builds.name: Heavy Strength AoE
builds.why: C-scaling Strength (needing real investment at 17/12) rewards a dedicated Strength build, and its Flowing Form skill gives rare whip-like crowd control for a hammer.
